description: Database Integration - Drizzle ORM with libSQL for persistent data storage including complete schema for users, trades, evolution, features, mutations, signals, and system logs

userStories.title: Create database schema for users table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the users table schema to store user account information with authentication data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create users table with fields: id (text primary key), email (unique), passwordHash, name, role (enum: admin|trader|viewer), createdAt, updatedAt
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields
Add default value 'viewer' for role field
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create database schema for trades table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the trades table schema to store all trading data with MT5 ticket mapping.
acceptanceCriteria: Create trades table with fields: systemTicket (text primary key), mt5Ticket (unique integer), symbol, direction (BUY|SELL enum), lots, entryPrice, currentPrice, stopLoss, takeProfit, openTime, closeTime, pnl, status (active|closed|pending enum), evolutionGeneration, featuresUsed (JSON text), confidence, userId (foreign key to users)
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields
Add foreign key constraint from userId to users.id
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create database schema for evolution_generations table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the evolution_generations table schema to track evolution cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Create evolution_generations table with fields: id (integer primary key auto increment), generationNumber (unique integer), timestamp, fitness, avgPerformance, controllerDecision, reason
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields
Add unique constraint on generationNumber
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create database schema for features table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the features table schema to store evolved trading features and their performance metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Create features table with fields: featureId (text primary key), featureName, successRate, totalUses, wins, losses, avgPnl, createdAt, updatedAt
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: COMPLETED: Features table added with all required fields and constraints

userStories.title: Create database schema for mutations table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the mutations table schema to track mutation history with evolution and feature relationships.
acceptanceCriteria: Create mutations table with fields: id (integer primary key auto increment), mutationType, generationId (foreign key to evolution_generations), targetFeatureId (foreign key to features), success (0|1 integer), fitnessImprovement, timestamp
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields
Add foreign key constraints to evolution_generations.id and features.featureId
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: COMPLETED: Mutations table added with all required fields and foreign key constraints

userStories.title: Create database schema for system_logs and signals tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to create the system_logs and signals tables to store system events and trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Create system_logs table with fields: id (integer primary key auto increment), timestamp, level (INFO|WARN|ERROR|DEBUG enum), component, message, details (JSON text)

Create signals table with fields: signalId (text primary key), symbol, signalType (STRONG_BUY|BUY|SELL|STRONG_SELL enum), confidence, htfContext, featuresUsed (JSON text), status (pending|approved|rejected|executed enum), timestamp, evolutionGeneration
Add NOT NULL constraints to required fields on both tables
Add enum constraints for level, signalType, and status fields
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: COMPLETED: System logs and signals tables added with all required fields and enum constraints

userStories.title: Configure Drizzle ORM client and environment variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to set up the Drizzle ORM database client with libSQL configuration for development and production environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/index.ts with database client export
Create environment variables: DATABASE_URL (development), TURSO_DATABASE_URL, TURSO_AUTH_TOKEN (production)
Configure libSQL client with @libsql/client
Set up Drizzle ORM with drizzle-orm
Add development mode check for local SQLite file vs production libSQL
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ALREADY IMPLEMENTED: Database client configured with libSQL, environment variables documented in .env.example

userStories.title: Configure Drizzle Kit for migrations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to configure Drizzle Kit to generate and run database migrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create or update drizzle.config.ts with schema path
Configure out folder for migration files
Set up driver to 'turso' for libSQL
Add database credentials to config from environment variables
Create package.json scripts: 'db:generate', 'db:migrate', 'db:push', 'db:studio'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: COMPLETED: Drizzle Kit configured with schema path, migration folder, turso driver, and package.json scripts added

userStories.title: Generate and test initial database migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to generate the initial migration from the schema and test it on a local database.
acceptanceCriteria: Run drizzle-kit generate to create initial migration
Verify migration SQL creates all 7 tables: users, trades, evolution_generations, features, mutations, system_logs, signals
Run migration on local libSQL instance
Verify all tables exist in database
Verify all foreign key constraints work correctly
Verify all enum constraints work correctly
Test migration rollback
Document migration process in docs/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create seed script for admin and demo users
userStories.description: As a developer, I need seed data for testing authentication and user management features.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/seed.ts with seed script
Create admin user: email 'admin@eurabay.com', role 'admin', hashed password
Create demo trader user: email 'trader@eurabay.com', role 'trader', hashed password
Use bcrypt or similar for password hashing
Add package.json script: 'db:seed'
Document seed data structure in docs/
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create seed script for sample trades (50 records)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sample trade data to test trading features and analytics.
acceptanceCriteria: Add seed function to src/lib/db/seed.ts for trades
Create 50 sample trades with varying symbols (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100)
Include mix of BUY and SELL directions
Include mix of statuses: active, closed, pending
Set realistic values for lots, prices, pnl (both positive and negative)
Link trades to demo trader user
Add evolutionGeneration values (1-10)
Add featuresUsed JSON arrays with 2-5 feature IDs each
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create seed script for evolution data (10 generations, 20 features, 100 mutations)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sample evolution data to test evolution system features.
acceptanceCriteria: Add seed function to src/lib/db/seed.ts for evolution data
Create 10 evolution_generations records with increasing generationNumber (1-10)
Set realistic fitness and avgPerformance values
Include mix of controller decisions: 'EVOLVE', 'MAINTAIN', 'RESET'
Create 20 features with varied success rates (0.3-0.9)
Link features to generations via createdAt timestamps
Create 100 mutations linking to generations and features
Include mix of successful (1) and failed (0) mutations
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create seed script for sample signals and system logs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need sample signals and logs to complete the seed data set.
acceptanceCriteria: Add seed function for signals to src/lib/db/seed.ts
Create 30 sample signals with varied types (STRONG_BUY, BUY, SELL, STRONG_SELL)
Include mix of statuses: pending, approved, rejected, executed
Link signals to evolution generations (1-10)
Add confidence values (0.5-0.95)
Create 50 system_logs with varied levels (INFO, WARN, ERROR, DEBUG)
Include varied components: 'trading', 'evolution', 'mt5', 'api'
Add realistic messages and timestamps
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create user repository with CRUD operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a user repository to provide a clean interface for user data operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/repositories/user.repository.ts
Create UserRepository class with methods: createUser, getUserById, getUserByEmail, updateUser, deleteUser, listUsers
Use Drizzle ORM queries with eq operator
Export singleton instance: userRepository
Add TypeScript types inferred from schema
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create trade repository with CRUD and query operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a trade repository to handle all trade data operations with complex queries.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/repositories/trade.repository.ts

Create TradeRepository class with methods: createTrade, getTradeBySystemTicket, getTradeByMT5Ticket, getActiveTrades, getRecentTrades, updateTrade, closeTrade, getTradesBySymbol, getTradesByDateRange, getTradesByUser
Use Drizzle ORM queries with eq, and, gte, lte, desc operators
Export singleton instance: tradeRepository
Add proper TypeScript types
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create evolution repository with generation and feature queries
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an evolution repository to manage evolution generations and feature data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/repositories/evolution.repository.ts

Create EvolutionRepository class with methods: createGeneration, getLatestGeneration, getGenerationsInRange, createFeature, getFeatureById, getTopFeatures, updateFeatureStats, createMutation, getMutationsByGeneration
Include queries for feature success rates and mutation analysis
Export singleton instance: evolutionRepository
Add proper TypeScript types
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create signal and log repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I need signal and log repositories to manage trading signals and system logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/repositories/signal.repository.ts with methods: createSignal, getSignalById, getPendingSignals, updateSignalStatus, getSignalsByGeneration
Create src/lib/db/repositories/log.repository.ts with methods: createLog, getLogsByComponent, getLogsByLevel, getLogsByDateRange, getRecentErrors
Export singleton instances: signalRepository, logRepository
Add proper TypeScript types to both repositories
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create database index file exporting all repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a central index file to import all repositories and database client.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/repositories/index.ts
Export db from parent index.ts
Export all repositories: userRepository, tradeRepository, evolutionRepository, signalRepository, logRepository
Export schema types if needed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement database connection pool configuration
userStories.description: As a system, I need to configure connection pooling for efficient database connections in production.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/pool.ts with connection pool configuration
Set maximum concurrent connections (default: 10)
Implement connection timeout (default: 30 seconds)
Add connection error handling with retry logic
Log connection pool metrics (active connections, idle connections)
Support development single connection mode
Support production connection pool mode
Add environment variable: DB_POOL_MAX, DB_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement in-memory caching layer for frequently accessed data
userStories.description: As a system, I need to cache frequently accessed data to reduce database load and improve performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/db/cache.ts with caching utilities
Implement CacheManager class with generic get/set methods
Add TTL (time-to-live) support per cache key
Cache user sessions with 5 minute TTL
Cache system configuration with 10 minute TTL
Cache active trades with 30 second TTL
Cache evolution metrics with 1 minute TTL
Implement cache invalidation on data changes
Add cache warming function for pre-loading common data
Add cache statistics (hit rate, miss rate, size)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Integrate caching layer into repositories
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate the caching layer into repository queries to improve performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Update trade repository to cache active trades query (30s TTL)
Update evolution repository to cache latest generation (1m TTL)
Update user repository to cache user by ID (5m TTL)
Implement cache invalidation on create/update/delete operations
Add cache warming call to seed script
Add cache statistics endpoint or logging
Typecheck passes
